en.dashboardText: Need to review your schedule or prepare for upcoming lessons?
en.footerReason: You're receiving this email because a student booked a lesson with you on Barnabi.

regular.subject: {{studentName}} booked a {{language}} lesson with you
regular.emailIntro: A student just booked time on your calendar.
regular.emailBody: {{studentName}} booked a {{language}} lesson with you. Here are the details:
regular.mascotText: Review the lesson from your calendar when you're ready. You can enter the classroom up to 15 minutes before start time.

trial.subject: {{studentName}} booked a trial {{language}} lesson with you
trial.emailTitle: New trial lesson on your calendar
trial.emailIntro: A student scheduled their first session with you.
trial.emailBody: {{studentName}} booked a trial {{language}} lesson with you. Here are the details:
trial.mascotText: Trial lessons are a great chance to make a strong first impression. Review the details in your calendar and join up to 15 minutes early.
